# requirements-test.txt — ADR-057 §2.1 standardised test dependencies
# Copy to each service repo as requirements-test.txt
# Usage in CI: pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-test.txt

# Test runner
pytest>=8.0
pytest-django>=4.8
pytest-cov>=5.0
pytest-xdist>=3.5
pytest-randomly>=3.15

# Test data factories
factory-boy>=3.3

# HTTP mocking
responses>=0.25          # for requests-based clients
respx>=0.21              # for httpx-based async clients

# Contract testing
schemathesis>=3.30        # REST/JSON API contract tests via WSGI
jsonschema>=4.21          # Celery task payload + DB view schema validation

# HTML parsing (HTMX fragment tests)
beautifulsoup4>=4.12
